item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-017","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":true,"rationale":"The prompt is a positive wakeup case expecting EDSP-style handling: identify that the yes/no proposition is malformed and decompose by task layer before giving a substantive judgment.
